title: rubus × lechepoeus
intro: Rubus × lechepoeus, also known as the Leche plant or Red Flower Raspberry, is a hybrid species of raspberry that is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × lechepoeus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support cognitive function. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
